data.title: Encryption
data.description: Advanced encryption techniques are used to protect user data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: A comprehensive suite of tools is employed to detect and mitigate potential cyber threats in real time.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control mechanisms ensure that sensitive data is accessible only to authorized personnel.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments are conducted to maintain a robust security posture.

data.title: Compliance
data.description: Spotify is compliant with global data protection laws to safeguard user privacy.
data.technical_spec: GDPR compliance, adherence to industry-specific regulations.
